lines.speaker: Eek
lines.text: I bet you're a mighty hero!

lines.speaker: Eek
lines.text: [player name]! Hero-of-the-humans!

lines.speaker: Eek
lines.text: You are a mighty hero, aren't you? I bet you've slain dragons and all sorts of stuff.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That's right. I'm awesome!

lines.speaker: Eek
lines.text: I could be your sidekick! [player name] and Eek! We could have all sorts of adventures together!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes!

lines.speaker: Eek
lines.text: Yay! [player name] and Eek! We'll travel all over the world fighting for justice! And freedom! And things like that!

lines.speaker: Eek
lines.text: Come on, [player name]! Let's have an adventure!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No. It's too dangerous.

lines.speaker: Eek
lines.text: Aww.

lines.speaker: Eek
lines.text: You know best, though. You're so BRAVE putting yourself in danger all by yourself!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm not a great hero. I'm just an ordinary person.

lines.speaker: Eek
lines.text: Aww. I bet you'll be a mighty hero someday, though.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, I'm trying to advance myself.

lines.speaker: Eek the Spider
lines.text: Brilliant! You can do it! Come on, let's have an adventure!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I don't know. I'm not very ambitious.

lines.speaker: Eek
lines.text: Aww...well...never mind.

lines.speaker: Eek
lines.text: Hey, you've only got four legs. How do you manage? Don't you fall over?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Actually, I've only got two legs.

lines.speaker: Eek
lines.text: Someone has stolen your legs! This is a DISASTER!

lines.speaker: Eek
lines.text: We've got to catch the leg thief!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No one stole my legs.

lines.speaker: Eek
lines.text: You gave your legs away?

lines.speaker: Eek
lines.text: That is so heroic...giving your legs away to someone without legs.

lines.speaker: Eek
lines.text: You're my hero!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: They're probably long gone by now.

lines.speaker: Eek
lines.text: You're right. They probably used the machine to give themselves really long running-away type legs. We'll never catch them now.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh, it's not so bad.

lines.speaker: Eek
lines.text: Then again, your legs are much longer than mine.

lines.speaker: Eek
lines.text: How's you get such long legs? Do you have some kind of leg-extending machine?

lines.speaker: Eek
lines.text: Where is the leg-extending machine? I want to use it!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: There is no leg-extending machine.

lines.speaker: Eek
lines.text: You would say that! You want to keep it for yourself!

lines.speaker: Eek
lines.text: Well that's okay. Maybe I don't even need your leg-extending machine!

lines.speaker: Eek
lines.text: I can do special leg-stretching exercises! Make my legs longer naturally! No artificial legs for me!

lines.speaker: Eek
lines.text: You just wait! Soon I'll have the best legs ever!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You can't use it. It's broken.

lines.speaker: Eek
lines.text: Oh! I wouldn't want to use it if it's broken.

lines.speaker: Eek
lines.text: It might malfunction and give me tiny, tiny legs! Like a slug, only with tiny legs!

lines.speaker: Eek
lines.text: Or it might make some legs longer than others so I wouldn't be able to walk and I'd fall over!

lines.speaker: Eek
lines.text: That would be TERRIBLE!

lines.speaker: Eek
lines.text: I'd better keep away from that machine!

lines.speaker: Eek
lines.text: Hey, are you scared of spiders?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, I'm scared of spiders.

lines.speaker: Eek
lines.text: Oh no! I'm sorry!

lines.speaker: Eek
lines.text: I've got to try not to be scary.

lines.speaker: Eek
lines.text: You should just pretend I'm not a spider! Like, maybe I'm an eight-legged mouse!

lines.speaker: Eek the Eight-Legged Mouse
lines.text: Hello, I'm an eight legged mouse! Squeak squeak squeak, I like cheese, cats are bad, I'm definitely not a spider.

lines.speaker: Eek the Eight-Legged Mouse
lines.text: Is that better?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You still look like a spider.

lines.speaker: Eek the Eight-Legged Mouse
lines.text: A spider? Oh no! I'm scared of spiders!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That's much better.

lines.speaker: Eek the Eight-Legged Mouse
lines.text: Yay! I'll be an eight-legged mouse forever until I forget.

lines.speaker: Eek
lines.text: You know what? It's great being a spider.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, I'm not scared of spiders.

lines.speaker: Eek
lines.text: Not even a bit?

lines.speaker: Eek
lines.text: I bet I can make you scared of spiders!

lines.speaker: Eek
lines.text: Boo! Raaar! I'm a scary spider!

lines.speaker: Eek
lines.text: Next time you go to sleep I'm going to crawl on your face and EAT YOUR EYEBALLS!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm still not scared.

lines.speaker: Eek
lines.text: Oh, wow! Even I was scared of me when I said that!

lines.speaker: Eek
lines.text: You're so brave! I bet you're not scared of anything!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That was a bit scary.

lines.speaker: Eek
lines.text: Ha ha ha ha ha ha ha! I made you scared of me! I made you scared of me!

lines.speaker: Eek
lines.text: It's okay, I'm not really going to eat your eyeballs. Spiders don't do that.

lines.speaker: Eek
lines.text: Well...I don't think they do.

lines.speaker: Eek
lines.text: I'm going to learn how to fly! I'm going to be a flying spider!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How are you going to fly?

lines.speaker: Eek
lines.text: I'm going to spin webs between my legs to make wings! Then I can fly!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Let's try it now!

lines.speaker: Eek
lines.text: Um...okay! I'll spin the webs...and then you throw me in the air.

lines.speaker: Eek
lines.text: Okay. Three...

lines.speaker: Eek
lines.text: Two...

lines.speaker: Eek
lines.text: One...

lines.speaker: Eek
lines.text: Wait! I'm not ready!

lines.speaker: Eek
lines.text: I don't think I've got the webs right. I'm not ready yet. We'll do it another time.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sounds dangerous.

lines.speaker: Eek
lines.text: It's not dangerous! What's the worst that could happen?

lines.speaker: Eek
lines.text: The worst that can happen is, like, the wings fail and I fall to my death.

lines.speaker: Eek
lines.text: Or I get eaten by a bird.

lines.speaker: Eek
lines.text: I'm going to rethink this.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Spiders can't fly!

lines.speaker: Eek
lines.text: Some spiders can fly! They use web strands to float in the air!

lines.speaker: Eek
lines.text: I think I know more about spiders than you, seeing how I am one!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm sorry, Eek.

lines.speaker: Eek
lines.text: That's okay.

lines.speaker: Eek
lines.text: I don't want to fly now. I'm not in the mood.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I don't believe you.

lines.speaker: Eek
lines.text: I don't care. I'm not talking to you any more.

lines.speaker: Eek
lines.text: Hey...there are so many humans in your world.

lines.speaker: Eek
lines.text: Back in my old web there are only spiders.

lines.speaker: Eek
lines.text: Suppose I was bitten by a magically-irradiated man?

lines.speaker: Eek
lines.text: I might become the Man-Spider! I'd gain all the powers of a man! Like um...

lines.speaker: Eek
lines.text: Um...what can humans do that's special?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Walk on two legs.

lines.speaker: Eek
lines.text: Walk on two legs! Yes! Then I could use my other six legs to FIGHT CRIME!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Use tools.

lines.speaker: Eek
lines.text: Yes! I could have all sorts of gadgets! Like a gadget that spins webs!

lines.speaker: Eek
lines.text: Wait...I can already spin webs.

lines.speaker: Eek
lines.text: Never mind!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Project heat-rays from our eyes.

lines.speaker: Eek
lines.text: Oh! I didn't know humans could do that!

lines.speaker: Eek
lines.text: Please don't fry me with your heat rays!

lines.speaker: Eek
lines.text: I'm too young to fry!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Nothing, really. Humans are pretty ordinary.

lines.speaker: Eek
lines.text: Aww, don't say that. Everyone is special!
